hooks.command: DIR=${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/Users/craigrobinson/wc_2026_predictor}; B=$(git -C "$DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$B" ] && [ "$B" != "main" ] && [ -z "$(git -C "$DIR" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && [ "$(git -C "$DIR" rev-list @{u}..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null)" = "0" ] && echo '⚠️  Branch clean and pushed — run /phase-closeout <ids> if ready to close out' || true
